backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the XpertLab backend defining all data types (UserProfile, Booking, Report, Attendance, etc.) and initializing persistent Maps for storage, along with access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (bottom nav redesign, frosted-glass styling, active tab animations, role-based visibility, etc.) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering pages, hooks, components, and utilities across the patient, staff, admin, and phlebotomist sections of the app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark themes, plus base border and background styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vite/React app, setting the XpertLab title, favicon, viewport meta, and mounting the React root div with the main.tsx entry script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for AppSelectorPage (/), PatientApp (/patient-app), and StaffApp (/staff-app), wrapped in QueryClientProvider and ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginScreen: Patient-facing login screen with a hero banner, feature grid, and an Internet Identity sign-in button.
frontend/src/components/auth/PatientLogi: Patient portal login screen with feature highlights, role-error messaging for staff accounts, and Internet Identity authentication handling.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog for new users to enter their name, phone, and (for staff) role before proceeding, saving the profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/auth/StaffLoginS: Staff portal login screen with feature highlights, demo-mode role selection buttons, role-error messaging for patient accounts, and Internet Identity authentication handling.
frontend/src/components/demo/MockBottomN: Read-only bottom navigation bar preview used in demo mode, rendering role-specific nav items from a config with interactive tab highlighting but no real routing.
frontend/src/components/demo/RolePermiss: Renders a table showing which app modules (e.g., Test Booking, Audit Log) are accessible by each AppRole (patient, phlebotomist, labAdmin, superAdmin) using check/X icons.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Main app shell with a sticky gradient header (logo, notification bell, user avatar) and a fixed bottom navigation bar, rendering child routes via TanStack Router's Outlet.
frontend/src/components/layout/BottomNav: Role-aware bottom navigation bar that reads the current user's role to display the appropriate nav items from roleNavConfig, highlighting the active route.
frontend/src/components/layout/Notificat: Bell icon button that shows an unread count badge and toggles the NotificationDrawer when clicked.
Slide-in sheet drawer listing notifications with type-based icons, relative timestamps, unread highlighting, and a mark-all-read action.
frontend/src/components/layout/PatientAp: Patient-specific app shell with a gradient header, floating pill-shaped bottom navigation, and local route state management for patient-facing pages.
frontend/src/components/layout/RoleGuard: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to '/' and users with disallowed roles to their default role path.
frontend/src/components/layout/ShiftGuar: Blocks phlebotomist-role users from accessing routes unless they have an active shift, auto-redirecting them to the attendance page; non-phlebotomist roles pass through freely.
frontend/src/components/layout/StaffAppL: Staff app shell that renders role-specific bottom navigation (phlebotomist, labAdmin, superAdmin), an optional demo-mode banner with exit button, and a sticky header.
frontend/src/components/shared/GradientB: A reusable button component supporting primary and outline variants with size options and a loading spinner state.
frontend/src/components/shared/LoadingSc: A full-screen loading overlay displaying the app logo with a pulse animation and an optional message.
frontend/src/components/shared/MedicalCa: A styled card wrapper component with optional hover effects and click handler for medical UI sections.
frontend/src/components/shared/Searchabl: A searchable dropdown component for selecting a lab test, with debounced filtering, pagination, and a read-only selected-state display.
frontend/src/components/shared/StatusBad: A small badge component that maps booking/task/severity status strings to styled pill labels.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor via React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: A hook that combines Internet Identity state with the caller's user profile query, exposing login, logout, and authentication status.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, login flow, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotifications.ts: A hook that polls the backend every 30 seconds to derive role-specific in-memory notifications and exposes unread count and mark-all-read functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for interacting with the ICP backend, covering user profiles, tests, bookings, and other domain entities.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Poppins/Inter fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for the XprtLab Medical brand including light/dark theme tokens, card styles, and floating nav variables.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminAttendance: Admin page that displays real-time active staff shifts and shift history for phlebotomists, showing check-in times, elapsed durations, and GPS coordinates fetched via custom query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminBookingsPa: Admin page listing all diagnostic bookings with search and status filter controls, allowing admins to update booking statuses and navigate to the report upload page.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminHospitalSa: Admin page for viewing and editing hospital sample billing records, displaying MRP, discounts, payment modes, and pending amounts with an edit dialog for updating billing details.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminReportsPag: Admin page that lists all lab reports with search filtering, and supports viewing or downloading individual report PDFs. Also provides a navigation button to upload new reports.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AuditLogsPage.t: Admin page displaying paginated audit logs with search and date-range filtering, rendered in a sortable table with 20 entries per page.
Admin form page for creating a health camp with name, date, and location fields; on submission it stores the camp in localStorage and displays a QR code with a copyable camp ID.
frontend/src/pages/admin/IncidentsPage.t: Admin page that fetches and displays incident reports with severity-based color coding and a dropdown filter for low/medium/high severity levels.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SecurityLogsPag: Admin page showing security event logs (e.g., mock location, device mismatch) with event-type filtering and a per-user device binding reset action backed by a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/admin/UploadReportPag: Admin page that allows staff to upload a PDF lab report for a patient by entering a patient Principal ID, booking ID, and selecting a file, with upload progress tracking and toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/AppSelectorPage.tsx: Landing page that displays the XpertLab logo, a hero banner, and navigation cards allowing users to choose between the Patient App and Staff App portals.
frontend/src/pages/demo/RBACDemoPage.tsx: Demo page that visualizes the role-based access control (RBAC) system by displaying metadata, responsibilities, and navigation permissions for each app role (Patient, Phlebotomist, Lab Admin, Super Admin).
Patient-facing page for browsing and selecting diagnostic tests with search filtering, multi-select with price totaling, and navigation to slot selection.
frontend/src/pages/patient/HomeCollectio: Patient-facing page for requesting home sample collection, allowing users to select tests, choose a time slot, and provide an address with optional GPS-based auto-fill via Nominatim reverse geocoding.
frontend/src/pages/patient/MyBookingsPag: Patient-facing page that lists all of the patient's test bookings sorted by date, showing test names, time slot, and status badge for each booking.
frontend/src/pages/patient/MyHomeCollect: Patient-facing page that displays all home collection requests sorted by date, showing address, selected tests, time slot, and status badge for each request.
frontend/src/pages/patient/MyHospitalSam: Displays a patient's hospital sample records fetched by phone number, showing a financial summary (total, paid, pending, discount) and individual sample cards with test names and payment details.
Renders a placeholder vitals page for patients showing empty blood pressure and blood glucose cards, with a message that vitals will appear once recorded by a phlebotomist.
frontend/src/pages/patient/PatientHomePa: Patient home screen displaying a personalized welcome banner, a grid of quick-action cards (book test, home collection, reports, vitals), and shortcuts to bookings and home collections.
frontend/src/pages/patient/ProfilePage.t: Shows the logged-in user's profile details (name, phone, principal, role) with a sign-out button that clears the Internet Identity session and React Query cache.
frontend/src/pages/patient/ReportsPage.t: Lists the patient's lab reports sorted by date, each with view and download links derived from the report's file URL, or shows an empty state if no reports exist.
frontend/src/pages/patient/SlotSelection: Allows patients to pick a time slot for their selected tests, displays a summary of chosen tests and total price, and submits a booking via the createBooking mutation on confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/AddHospi: Form page for phlebotomists to record a new hospital sample, including patient info, test selection, billing fields (MRP, discount, payment mode), and submission via the createHospitalSample mutation with a success/locked confirmation state.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/Attendan: Attendance check-in/check-out page that enforces device fingerprinting, GPS geofencing, mock-location detection, and selfie capture before starting or ending a shift, with security event logging.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/HomeColl: Displays all home collection requests sorted by timestamp, showing address, GPS coordinates, and allowing phlebotomists to update each request's status via a dropdown selector.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/MyHospit: Read-only list page showing all hospital samples recorded by the logged-in phlebotomist, with billing fields marked as locked and sample details like test name, payment info, and status.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/Phleboto: Duplicate/variant of AttendancePage with the same GPS, device fingerprint, selfie, and shift start/end logic, additionally importing the caller's user profile to derive the hospitalId.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/RecordVi: A form page for phlebotomists to record patient BP (systolic, diastolic, pulse) and RBS (glucose) readings, using tabbed inputs and submitting via mutation hooks with toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/ScanCamp: A camera-based QR code scanner page for phlebotomists to scan camp QR codes for check-in logging, displaying a live video preview with scan results and controls.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/TaskQueu: Displays a combined, sorted task queue of bookings and home collection requests assigned to the phlebotomist, with inline status update dropdowns and navigation shortcuts to scan QR and record vitals.
frontend/src/pages/staff/SubmitIncidentP: A form page for staff to submit incident reports with a description, severity level selection, and optional photo upload, showing upload progress and navigating away on success.
frontend/src/PatientApp.tsx: Patient-facing app shell that handles Internet Identity authentication, profile loading, role validation, and client-side routing between all patient pages via a useState-based navigation pattern with lazy-loaded page components.
frontend/src/StaffApp.tsx: Root component for the staff-facing app that handles authentication, role detection, demo mode, and lazy-loaded routing for phlebotomist, lab admin, and super admin pages.
frontend/src/types/models.ts: Re-exports backend types and defines additional frontend-specific interfaces such as CartItem, CampEvent, CheckIn, NavItem, and RoleNavConfig.
frontend/src/utils/deviceFingerprint.ts: Provides device fingerprinting utilities that generate/persist a unique device ID in localStorage and parse the user agent to extract OS version and browser/device model.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Collection of formatting utility functions for dates, times, currency (INR), Principal IDs, relative timestamps, and random ID generation.
frontend/src/utils/geoHelpers.ts: Geo-utility functions for attendance validation including haversine distance calculation, GPS accuracy checks, mock location detection, geofence validation, and suspicious speed-jump detection.
frontend/src/utils/roleConfig.ts: Defines per-role navigation items (label, path, icon) for all AppRoles and exports a `getDefaultPath` function returning the default route for each role.
frontend/src/utils/roleHelpers.ts: Provides boolean helper functions to check a user's AppRole (isPatient, isAdmin, isStaff, etc.), a role label formatter, and a `getDefaultPath` function based on a UserProfile.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers for maintaining parameters across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and background gradients, with plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state including architectural notes, existing implemented features, and new feature requests for a role-based mobile app with a floating frosted-glass bottom navigation bar.
